chunks.title: David's Grief and Joab's Rebuke
chunks.reason: Narrative unit covering the king's mourning, Joab's intervention, and David's return to the gate.

chunks.title: Israel's Dispute and Judah's Response
chunks.reason: Dialogue between the tribes of Israel and Judah regarding the king's return.

chunks.title: Shimei's Reconciliation
chunks.reason: Narrative of Shimei's arrival, his plea for mercy, and David's decision to spare him.

chunks.title: Mephibosheth and Ziba
chunks.reason: Dialogue between David and Mephibosheth regarding the land dispute with Ziba.

chunks.title: Barzillai's Farewell
chunks.reason: Narrative of Barzillai declining to go to Jerusalem and the king blessing him.

chunks.title: Dispute Between Israel and Judah
chunks.reason: Argument between the tribes of Israel and Judah over their respective claims to the king.
